title: Karnataka High Court issues notice to BJP MLA Byrathi Basavaraj on State's plea to cancel his bail in murder case
description: The Karnataka High Court on April 9 issued notice and sought the response of KR Pura BJP MLA Byrathi Basavaraj on a plea filed by the State seeking cancellation of the bail granted to him by a special court in a murder case.Single-judge Justice S Sunil Dutt Yadav heard State Additional Public Prosecutor BN Jagadish seeking cancellation of the bail. It then proceeded to issue notice to Basavaraj and posted the case for further consideration on April 16.Justice Sunil Dutt YadavThe MLA is the fifth
